title: Anti-Hero
meaning_summary: This song combines direct emotion with a strong melodic center, making it easy to revisit and commercially durable.
revenue_drivers: Streaming scale and playlist inclusion remain the largest recurring drivers.
A durable hook and broad familiarity help the song keep earning across catalog listening.
Sync, social reuse, and seasonal spikes can lift the baseline.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models current streaming scale, songwriter participation, and Midnights-era catalog replay.

ownership.master_owner: Artist/label-distributed master economics with strong artist-side participation assumed
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears valuable because Swift is a primary songwriter
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a public royalty statement.
